question_title: What will be the value of "Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 1-Year Constant Maturity, Quoted on an Investment Basis" on 2026-01-14?
summary: The FRED DGS1 series already reports the 1-Year Treasury yield on 2026-01-14 as 3.50%. This is the actual resolution value from the resolution source. Distribution is extremely tight around this known value, with minimal uncertainty only for potential data revisions (which are very rare for Treasury yields).

factors.description: FRED DGS1 already reports the actual value of 3.50% on 2026-01-14 - this is the resolution source itself
Treasury yield data is rarely revised, so the reported 3.50% is almost certainly the final value
Recent trend shows mild decline from 3.6% to 3.47-3.53% range, consistent with the 3.50% reading

reasoning:

Since this data is already available from FRED (the resolution source), the answer is known.
